title: Stable Cursor Timelines, Filters, Reverse Navigation, and Reflow · Independent Type Trial

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Ts Deterministic Sort
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab TypeScript team handles case 8674 during an inclusive cross-device research reader review. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove deterministic ordering, signed cursors, keyset directions, changing data, and accessible navigation; every external value must remain unknown until current runtime validation admits it; then change one PostgreSQL constraint, transaction, migration, upsert, query, or search plan and preserve admitted state. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose a documented total order with unique tie-breaker and state which edits can move an entry.

What must be established before implementation?
